heading: Unlawful acts and omissions by officers, directors, employees, or agents
label: 687f Unlawful acts and omissions by officers, directors, employees, or agents
notes: References in TextFor definition of “this chapter”, referred to in subsec. (a), see References in Text note set out under .section 661 of this title

children.heading: Violation by licensee deemed violation by persons participating
children.label: a Violation by licensee deemed violation by persons participating
children.text: Wherever a licensee violates any provision of this chapter or regulation issued thereunder by reason of its failure to comply with the terms thereof or by reason of its engaging in any act or practice which constitutes or will constitute a violation thereof, such violation shall be deemed to be also a violation and an unlawful act on the part of any person who, directly or indirectly, authorizes, orders, participates in, or causes, brings about, counsels, aids, or abets in the commission of any acts, practices, or transactions which constitute or will constitute, in whole or in part, such violation.

children.heading: Breach of fiduciary duty
children.label: b Breach of fiduciary duty
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any officer, director, employee, agent, or other participant in the management or conduct of the affairs of a licensee to engage in any act or practice, or to omit any act, in breach of his fiduciary duty as such officer, director, employee, agent, or participant, if, as a result thereof, the licensee has suffered or is in imminent danger of suffering financial loss or other damage.

children.heading: Disqualification of officers and employees for dishonesty, fraud, or breach of trust
children.label: c Disqualification of officers and employees for dishonesty, fraud, or breach of trust
A
children.text: he has been convicted of a felony, or any other criminal offense involving dishonesty or breach of trust, or

children.label: B
children.text: he has been found civilly liable in damages, or has been permanently or temporarily enjoined by an order, judgment, or decree of a court of competent jurisdiction, by reason of any act or practice involving fraud or breach of trust; or

children.label: A
children.text: he is hereafter convicted of a felony, or any other criminal offense involving dishonesty or breach of trust, or

children.label: B
children.text: he is hereafter found civilly liable in damages, or is permanently or temporarily enjoined by an order, judgment, or decree of a court of competent jurisdiction, by reason of any act or practice involving fraud or breach of trust.
